title: peppery crispy algerian udon noodles
description: a flavorful and crunchy kid-friendly dish from algeria featuring udon noodles and a variety of spices. serve with a side of steamed vegetables for a well-rounded meal.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the ground cumin, ground coriander, ground black pepper, and red pepper flakes. cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
add the udon noodles and chicken broth to the skillet. cook, stirring occasionally, until the noodles are slightly undercooked, about 3-4 minutes.
add the crushed red pepper and stir to combine.
cook the noodles until they are al dente, about 2-3 minutes more.
remove the skillet from the heat and stir in the chopped parsley and bhuna spice blend.
serve the peppery crispy algerian udon noodles hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
